blockingIssues.description: api/refresh.ts is a stub that only checks auth and returns {status:"ok"}. It does NOT dispatch a GitHub Actions workflow. According to CLAUDE.md and VAL-API-001, it should use GITHUB_PAT and GITHUB_REPO to trigger workflow_dispatch on scrape-user-data.yml and return {run_url:"..."}. No GitHub API client (octokit or otherwise) is imported or used.
blockingIssues.fixRequired: Implement the GitHub API call to dispatch scrape-user-data.yml using GITHUB_PAT and GITHUB_REPO env vars. Return {run_url:"..."} with the workflow run URL.
